title: Spatial / multi-omic extension scoping
context: Backlog — v2 candidate. Scope a spatial / multi-omic extension of the atlas. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Produce a design spec scoping a spatial / multi-omic extension of the Ewing single-cell atlas.
acceptanceCriteria: Candidate spatial/multi-omic data modalities and open-access sources surveyed.
Schema/pipeline extension points identified with effort and risk notes.
Open-access-only and provenance guardrails carried into the v2 scope.
